schema_note: Cross-paper comparability groups: evidence nodes that measure the same underlying phenomenon, even when observable names or contexts differ across papers. The semantic-edge generator uses these to hold implicit-headline claims accountable across the field, and the idea consolidator uses each group as the basis of one idea.

m1_stability_outcome.title: m=1 kink stability in helical / rotating Z-pinches
m1_stability_outcome.description: Evidence reporting whether the m=1 kink mode is stable in helical or rotating Z-pinch settings at moderate Mach-Alfven number. Value 1 = stable, 0 = unstable / persists.

m0_sausage_stabilization.title: m=0 sausage growth and shear-flow stabilization
m0_sausage_stabilization.description: Evidence about m=0 sausage instability scaling, sheared-flow stabilization thresholds, and downstream confinement outcomes in Z-pinches.

beltrami_equilibrium_class.title: Beltrami / double-Beltrami equilibrium constructions
beltrami_equilibrium_class.description: Evidence about the existence, beta, and structure of Beltrami / double-Beltrami equilibria that admit the H3 quartic Alfven minimum.

continuum_spectrum_alfven_minimum.title: Continuum spectrum near the Alfven minimum
continuum_spectrum_alfven_minimum.description: Evidence about the structure of the Alfven continuum near its quartic minimum (Friman-Rotenberg, Hameiri-Lust-Hameiri operators) and the discrete spectrum accumulating there.

numerical_eigenvalue_benchmarks.title: Numerical eigenvalue benchmarks and constraint-violation tests
numerical_eigenvalue_benchmarks.description: Evidence from code-to-code MHD eigenvalue benchmarks and from violating Kumar's H1-H5 constraints to see the framework break in the predicted way.
